text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe's condition isn't improving, but
fall arrives, and we manage to push through the
worst of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her weight has increased significantly, which
gives her a sense of fulfilment. Agnes Tachyon
also interprets this as a sign of growth.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hopeful that our progress will continue, we
decide to take on the St. Lite Kinen.
